allow: Bash(mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -u root archon -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as active_routes FROM fleet_routes WHERE status = 'ACTIVE';")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('success:', j.success, '| routes:', j.data?.length\);")

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $proc" } else { Write-Host "No process on 3001" })

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $proc" })
